visual_summary: The image shows a bustling indoor market with various fresh fruits and vegetables stacked on tables and baskets. Several people are walking, talking, or shopping under a large sign reading 'Marché Jean-Talon'. The market has high ceilings and industrial-style lighting with natural light coming through large windows.
continuity_anchors: industrial ceiling with lighting and fans
plausible_actions: someone checking their phone or calling
cinematic_notes: use wide shots to capture the spacious market and crowd
close-ups on colorful produce for texture and detail
natural light from windows can create soft shadows
tracking shots following shoppers through aisles

visual_summary: A narrow urban alleyway bordered by a metal fence on the left and brick buildings on the right, with signage for a Korean chicken restaurant prominently displayed. The alley leads to a larger building in the background with glass windows and an arched central window. The sky is overcast, and a few people are seen walking down the alley.
location: Urban alley with restaurants and mixed-use buildings
subjects: large background building with arched window
continuity_anchors: distinctive background building with arched window
plausible_actions: workers maintaining fence or building exteriors
cinematic_notes: low-angle shot emphasizing alley depth and texture of buildings
use natural overcast light for soft shadows
focus pull from metal fence to background building for perspective shift

visual_summary: The image shows a blue and white STM metro train stopped at an underground station platform with visible passengers inside, some seated and some standing. The platform is marked with a bright yellow textured safety strip, and there is a digital display above the train showing timing and metro line information.
continuity_anchors: blue and white STM train exterior
passengers inside train wearing winter clothes
cinematic_notes: use close-ups of passengers inside train windows for emotional cues
capture reflections on train windows for layered framing
emphasize contrast between bright platform strip and darker train exterior for visual interest
use overhead signs and digital displays as motivators for character movement

visual_summary: This image shows two illuminated fashion advertisements positioned next to a stairway in an indoor public space. The left ad features a man in a light-colored suit and shorts with the brand name 'TRISTAN', while the right ad displays a woman in a stylish outfit with text in French. The surrounding area is characterized by beige walls, tiled floors, and a staircase with metal handrails.
location: Indoor station or transit area near stairs
continuity_anchors: illuminated ads with 'TRISTAN' and French text
plausible_actions: people walking up or down the stairs
passengers pausing to look at ads
maintenance staff cleaning the stairway or ads

capture reflections on the tiled floor for depth
employ the illuminated ads as natural light sources or framing elements
